title: DCobblemon++
description: DCobblemon++ is the ultimate Cobblemon-enhancing modpack, packed with QoL features and addons for a seamless, vanilla-style adventure!
body: DCobblemon++ is a carefully curated modpack built around the Cobblemon mod. It features a selection of quality-of-life (QoL) mods and integrates additional addons, inspired by the Cobblemon Discord community, to enhance AI and gameplay. The goal of DCobblemon++ is to deliver an enriched Cobblemon experience while preserving the familiar feel of vanilla Minecraft.
